sections.title: New Main Navigation
sections.subtitle: Streamlined site architecture for better discoverability and user flow.

sections.heading: Navigation Hierarchy
sections.body: The new main navigation organizes content into six primary categories, each with clear sub-sections. This structure reduces cognitive load and aligns with user mental models.

items.title: Home
items.body: Dashboard with personalized content, quick actions, and key metrics.

items.title: Products
items.body: Browseable catalog with filters, categories, and featured collections.

items.title: Solutions
items.body: Industry-specific solutions, use cases, and implementation guides.

items.title: Resources
items.body: Documentation, blog, webinars, case studies, and support center.

items.title: Pricing
items.body: Transparent plans, comparison table, FAQ, and custom quote request.

items.title: Company
items.body: About us, leadership, careers, press, partners, and contact.

sections.heading: Design Principles
sections.body:
• Consistent labeling across all touchpoints
• Mobile-first responsive behavior
• Accessible keyboard navigation and ARIA labels
• Mega-menu for desktop with logical grouping
• Persistent search and user account access

sections.title: Implement Navigation Updates
sections.body: Ready to deploy the new navigation across all properties? Coordinate with the frontend team for a phased rollout.

seo.metaDescription: Overview of the new main navigation architecture and page hierarchy.
